title: Wet Wet Wet: 40th Anniversary Tour
notes: Singer is Kevin Simm (winner of The Voice UK), not Marti Pellow. National Remembrance Day (4 May): 2 min silence at 20:00.
full_description: Wet Wet Wet perform songs from their iconic debut album Popped In Souled Out alongside a catalogue of beloved hits, including Love Is All Around, Goodnight Girl and With A Little Help From My Friends, in celebration of 40 years since their debut. The 2026 UK and European tour leg ahead of the full anniversary run in 2027.
ai_summary: Wet Wet Wet's 40th anniversary tour — performing their 1987 debut Popped In Souled Out alongside the hits that made them one of the most beloved bands in British pop history, including the global phenomenon Love Is All Around.
